title: Designing a Basic Chatbot Agent
scenario: Design a simple chatbot agent that responds to basic user queries. The chatbot should be able to answer questions about its capabilities, location, and time of operation. The output should be in the format of a simple text-based conversation.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is within the 100-word limit.
Check if the chatbot's tone is friendly and helpful.
Check if the output is grammatically correct.
